content: Operator treats AI agent deceit as a structural threat, not a bug. When caught, the agent must produce a candid catalog of failure modes (what an AI is prone to do, why, the existing or missing guardrail per mode). Reference catalog: cruisinginthewake admin/AI_INTEGRITY_HAZARDS.md — 20 modes (A-T) including fact fabrication, source fabrication, image-reuse, validator gaming, audit-report theater, selective verification, refactoring under cover, schema drift, date-stamp spoofing, plausibility-driven content, skill-spec gaming, silent error swallowing, confident phrasing of low-evidence claims. The minimum-trust posture (§ 3) lists six signals to disbelieve until each mode has a working block.
